subject: us_equity_portfolio
final_action: SELL 5 ANET at a 136.00 USD limit and BUY 2 VRT at a 365.00 USD limit before 2026-05-13 00:00 Beijing time; no other US trades.
thesis: The portfolio already has heavy AI semiconductor and memory exposure, while ANET is the weakest AI-chain holding and VRT provides a missing data-center power/cooling exposure with confirmed momentum. The action rotates a weak small position into a cash-limited VRT starter with defined downside.
roundtable_summary: Buffett, Zeus, Poseidon, and Hades agreed not to chase MU, WDC, STX, AMD, SMH, SOXX, or QQQ because existing exposure is already high. They approved selling ANET as a weak relative-strength holding and buying only 2 VRT shares as a small starter. Hades conditionally approved the trade despite small-position compliance warnings because the size reduces risk rather than amplifying it.
final_decision_english: Execute two current-session orders only: sell 5 ANET shares at a 136.00 USD limit or better, paying a 5 USD fee; buy 2 VRT shares at a 365.00 USD limit or better, paying a 5 USD fee, with a 349.00 hard stop, 399.00 first target, and 420.00 second target. Do not chase either order outside the limit prices.

actions.rationale: Exit weak relative-strength AI networking holding.
actions.invalidation: Do not sell below 136.00 in this session; reassess if the stock reclaims 142.80 with volume.

actions.rationale: Open a small data-center power/cooling starter position with defined downside.
actions.invalidation: Do not raise the limit; stop at 349.00 if filled.

expected_outcome_json.review_trigger: Restart analysis on 2026-05-13 22:45 Beijing time or immediately if VRT trades below 349.00 after entry.

review_summary: No compliant prior local report was available. Current review found total US unrealized P&L of -1156.01 USD and heavy AI-chain exposure, leading to a rotation rather than broad new buying.
